financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is making more money and managing its costs well, which is a good sign.
They are using their profits to reward investors and are ready to grow in the tech industry.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Low Risk
bullets: Wipro faces risks from cyber threats and currency changes, which could hurt its business and reputation.
The company is taking steps to manage these risks, but they still pose challenges to its financial health.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing a great job taking care of the environment and managing its resources.
It also has strong leadership and fair practices, which help it run smoothly and responsibly.

capital_structure.title: Capital Structure
capital_structure.label: Well Managed
bullets: Wipro has a healthy balance of money it owns and money it owes, making it financially strong.
The company can easily pay its debts and has a good reputation for borrowing, which keeps risks low.

management_discussion.title: Management Discussion
management_discussion.label: Excellent
bullets: The report clearly explains how the company is doing and what it plans to do next, which builds trust.
Management shares detailed information about their focus on new technology and keeping customers happy, showing they are on the right track.

strategy.title: Strategy Overview
strategy.label: Excellent
bullets: Wipro has a clear plan with specific goals, especially in using new technology and buying other companies to grow.
They focus on working with big clients and partners, which helps them grow steadily, but they must watch out for changing tech and economic challenges.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Average
bullets: Wipro is doing well financially and is investing in new technologies, which could help it grow in the future.
However, challenges like changing technology and trade issues could make it harder for Wipro to succeed, so it's wise to be careful.
